Campaigns such as Stop Killing Games list hundreds of titles rendered unusable this way.

paragraphs.text: Dear European Commission, I am a consumer from Türkiye who regularly buys digital products sold in the EU. I strongly support the proposed Digital Fairness Act (DFA) and its aim to stop dark patterns, misleading influencer marketing, addictive design, and unfair personalisation. The 2024 Fitness Check confirms that current rules still leave consumers exposed. Yet one major gap remains: publishers can still deactivate or kill digital productsespecially video gamesafter sale. When authentication servers are closed, buyers lose both money and access. Campaigns such as Stop Killing Games list hundreds of titles rendered unusable this way, erasing entire libraries overnight. Recommendation: add a continuity of access rider to the DFA Minimum operability where an online link is essential, functionality must be guaranteed for a set number of years after the last EU sale. Sunset solution at end-of-life the trader must either (a) publish an offline patch, (b) release server code so community hosting becomes legal, or (c) issue full refunds. No destructive DRM technology that disables a legitimate copy once back-end services end should be deemed an unfair practice per se. Data portability single-player saves and user-generated content must be exportable before shutdown. Effective enforcement national authorities should be able to impose interim measures and fines that scale with turnover. Recommendation: add a continuity of access rider to the DFA Minimum operability where an online link is essential, functionality must be guaranteed for a set number of years after the last EU sale. Sunset solution at end-of-life the trader must either (a) publish an offline patch, (b) release server code so community hosting becomes legal, or (c) issue full refunds. No destructive DRM technology that disables a legitimate copy once back-end services end should be deemed an unfair practice per se. Data portability single-player saves and user-generated content must be exportable before shutdown. Effective enforcement national authorities should be able to impose interim measures and fines that scale with turnover. Akin - Akin, an Elite Global Law Firm thelens.slaughterandmay.com These steps reinforce the DFAs own goals: Dark patterns & addiction fear-of-loss would no longer drive repeat purchases. Influencer transparency mandatory continuity makes limited life-spans explicit. Fair personalisation profiling loses power if the product cannot later be revoked. Cultural preservation and sustainability also benefit: video games are modern heritage, and continued playability avoids needless electronic waste. A harmonised rule set prevents forum shopping and offers certainty to both businesses and consumers across the EEA. The DFA is the perfect vehicle to end the unfair practice of destroying purchased digital products. Embedding a clear right to continued accessor a concrete remedywill close a glaring loophole, boost trust, and set a global standard for digital fairness. Thank you for your consideration. Yours faithfully, Ufuk İşitmezoğlu Amasya, Türkiye
